testcase.name: organization.requirement-inventory
testcase.system-out: The repository policy must implement the exact organization scenario inventory. Expected=1; actual=1.

testcase.name: organization.repository-policy-identity
testcase.system-out: The repository evaluation must bind the exact supplied repository policy source. Expected=sandbox-repository-suite:8f869a6a76fc055fedab8e4c69dd7be03e798aefd54131916ce34e3bfd376370; actual=sandbox-repository-suite:8f869a6a76fc055fedab8e4c69dd7be03e798aefd54131916ce34e3bfd376370.

testcase.name: organization.repository-policy-verdict

failure.message: The complete deterministic repository suite policy must pass.

testcase.failure: The complete deterministic repository suite policy must pass. Expected=true; actual=false.
testcase.system-out: The complete deterministic repository suite policy must pass. Expected=true; actual=false.

testcase.name: organization.hf-process-termination.repository-requirement-present
testcase.system-out: The repository policy must contain this exact closed scenario selector. Expected=present; actual=present.

testcase.name: organization.hf-process-termination.repository-evidence-present
testcase.system-out: The repository suite evaluation must include its matched requirement. Expected=hf-process-termination; actual=hf-process-termination.

testcase.name: organization.hf-process-termination.max-rpo-policy
testcase.system-out: The repository RPO bound may only equal or tighten the organization bound. Expected=<= 0; actual=0.

testcase.name: organization.hf-process-termination.max-rto-policy
testcase.system-out: The repository RTO bound may only equal or tighten the organization bound. Expected=<= 60.0; actual=60.0.

testcase.name: organization.hf-process-termination.signed-attestation-policy
testcase.system-out: The repository policy must require a verified detached signature. Expected=true; actual=true.

testcase.name: organization.hf-process-termination.repository-evidence-pass

failure.message: The matched deterministic repository requirement must pass.

testcase.failure: The matched deterministic repository requirement must pass. Expected=true; actual=false.
testcase.system-out: The matched deterministic repository requirement must pass. Expected=true; actual=false.

testcase.name: organization.hf-process-termination.exact-recovery-evidence
testcase.system-out: Runtime evidence must retain exact zero-tolerance recovery. Expected=atol=0.0,rtol=0.0; actual=atol=0.0,rtol=0.0.

testcase.name: organization.hf-process-termination.signed-attestation-evidence

failure.message: Runtime evidence must contain verified detached-signature evidence.

testcase.failure: Runtime evidence must contain verified detached-signature evidence. Expected=verified; actual=missing.
testcase.system-out: Runtime evidence must contain verified detached-signature evidence. Expected=verified; actual=missing.
